title: AI in Urban Planning: A Coastal City Study
summary_short: The paper investigates AI-driven urban planning in coastal cities, finding that AI-optimized green corridors reduce peak heat by 15%.
summary_detailed: The study analyzes coastal urbanization stressors and implements AI-based heat mapping across 10 cities...

key_insights.core_thesis: AI-driven urban planning can significantly mitigate urban heat in coastal cities.
key_insights.methodology: Comparative study of 10 cities using satellite imagery and AI heat mapping.
key_insights.main_findings: 15% reduction in peak heat using AI-optimized green corridors.
key_insights.research_gap: Lack of comprehensive data for low-income suburbs.
key_insights.practical_implication: Recommendation of a hybrid AI-community planning approach.

literature_review_notes: This paper provides empirical evidence for the effectiveness of AI in climate-resilient urban design.
